div.p: Shape trace: α[seq, seq] @ V[seq, d_v] → Output[seq, d_v] Each output position is a convex combination of all value vectors.

g.text: i=0 | Σⱼ α₀ⱼ · Vⱼ | weighted sum
i=1 | Σⱼ α₁ⱼ · Vⱼ | weighted sum
i=2 | Σⱼ α₂ⱼ · Vⱼ | weighted sum
i=3 | Σⱼ α₃ⱼ · Vⱼ | weighted sum

text.tspan: # Output[2] = weighted combination of ALL value vectors
# output[2] heavily attends to V₂ (50% weight)
# with contributions from V₁ and V₃ (20% each) and V₀ (10%)
# Output[2] = weighted combination of ALL value vectors
# output[2] heavily attends to V₂ (50% weight)
# with contributions from V₁ and V₃ (20% each) and V₀ (10%)

g.text: αᵢⱼ | attention weight from pos i to pos j
Vⱼ | value vector at position j
Σⱼ | sum over all key positions j
